This package contains the Lisp comparison and condition functions

subprograms.name: eq
subprograms.code: procedure eq(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Compare two items for not equality.

subprograms.name: lt
subprograms.code: procedure lt(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

subprograms.name: ne
subprograms.code: procedure ne(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Is first item less than the second item?
